API docs by Redocly

Traccar (6.14.5)

Download OpenAPI specification:Download

Traccar Support: support@traccar.org URL: https://www.traccar.org/ License: Apache 2.0

Traccar GPS tracking server API documentation. To use the API you need to have a server instance. For testing purposes you can use one of free demo servers. For production use you can install your own server or get a subscription service.

Server

Server information

Fetch Server information

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/server

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/server

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/server

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/server

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/server

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/server

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "registration": true,
  • "readonly": true,
  • "deviceReadonly": true,
  • "limitCommands": true,
  • "map": "string",
  • "bingKey": "string",
  • "mapUrl": "string",
  • "poiLayer": "string",
  • "announcement": "string",
  • "latitude": 0,
  • "longitude": 0,
  • "zoom": 0,
  • "version": "string",
  • "forceSettings": true,
  • "coordinateFormat": "string",
  • "openIdEnabled": true,
  • "openIdForce": true,
  • "attributes": { }
}

Update Server information

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique server configuration identifier
registration
boolean

Whether new user registrations are allowed
readonly
boolean

When true only administrators can modify server-wide settings
deviceReadonly
boolean

Disallow device attribute changes for non-admins
limitCommands
boolean

Restrict command execution to supported protocol commands
map
string

Default map layer identifier
bingKey
string

Bing Maps API key used when Bing is selected as a provider
mapUrl
string

Custom tile server URL template if configured
poiLayer
string

External point-of-interest layer configuration
announcement
string

Message displayed to all users in the web application
latitude
number

Default map center latitude
longitude
number

Default map center longitude
zoom
integer

Default map zoom level
version
string

Traccar server version string
forceSettings
boolean

Forces users to use the server-wide settings instead of their own
coordinateFormat
string

Default coordinate format for displaying positions
openIdEnabled
boolean

Indicates whether OpenID authentication is available
openIdForce
boolean

Require OpenID authentication for all users when enabled
attributes
object

Additional server-level configuration values

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/server

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/server

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/server

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/server

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/server

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/server

}

BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
latitude
required
number <double>
longitude
required
number <double>

token
string

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "email": "string",
  • "phone": "string",
  • "readonly": true,
  • "administrator": true,
  • "map": "string",
  • "latitude": 0,
  • "longitude": 0,
  • "zoom": 0,
  • "password": "string",
  • "coordinateFormat": "string",
  • "disabled": true,
  • "expirationTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "deviceLimit": 0,
  • "userLimit": 0,
  • "deviceReadonly": true,
  • "limitCommands": true,
  • "fixedEmail": true,
  • "poiLayer": "string",
  • "attributes": { }
}

required
email
required
string
password
required
string <password>

Open a Session as another User

Admin or manager only. Establishes a session impersonating the specified user.

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
path Parameters
id
required
integer

Responses

https://demo.traccar.org/api/session/{id}

Devices

Device management

Fetch a list of Devices

Without any params, returns a list of the user's devices

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
all
boolean

Can only be used by admins or managers to fetch all entities
userId
integer

Standard users can use this only with their own userId
id
integer

To fetch one or more devices. Multiple params can be passed like id=31&id=42

uniqueId
string

To fetch one or more devices. Multiple params can be passed like uniqueId=333331&uniqieId=44442

excludeAttributes
boolean

Exclude attributes field from device payload
limit
integer

Limit the number of returned results
offset
integer

Offset for pagination
keyword
string

Search keyword filter (searches name, uniqueId, phone, model, contact)

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/devices

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/devices

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/devices

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/devices

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/devices

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/devices

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "uniqueId": "string",
    • "status": "string",
    • "disabled": true,
    • "lastUpdate": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "positionId": 0,
    • "groupId": 0,
    • "phone": "string",
    • "model": "string",
    • "contact": "string",
    • "category": "string",
    • "attributes": { }
    }
]

Create a Device

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique identifier assigned by Traccar
name
string

Human friendly device label
uniqueId
string

Hardware or protocol specific unique identifier
status
string

Current connection status such as online, offline, or unknown

disabled
boolean

Whether the device is disabled by an administrator
lastUpdate
string or null <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
positionId
integer or null <int64>

Identifier of the last known position
groupId
integer or null <int64>

Parent group identifier when the device is assigned to a group
phone
string or null

Contact phone number used for SMS commands
model
string or null

Device model or hardware revision
contact
string or null

Responsible person's contact information
category
string or null

Free form category used for grouping devices in the UI
attributes
object

Custom attributes for protocol or business specific data

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/devices

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/devices

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/devices

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/devices

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/devices

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/devices

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "uniqueId": "string",
  • "status": "string",
  • "disabled": true,
  • "lastUpdate": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
  • "positionId": 0,
  • "groupId": 0,
  • "phone": "string",
  • "model": "string",
  • "contact": "string",
  • "category": "string",
  • "attributes": { }
}

Content type
application/json
{
  • "id": 0,
  • "name": "string",
  • "uniqueId": "string",
  • "status": "string",

  • "attributes": { }
}

Update a Device

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
path Parameters
id
required
integer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique identifier assigned by Traccar
name
string

Human friendly device label
uniqueId
string

Hardware or protocol specific unique identifier
status
string

Current connection status such as online, offline, or unknown

disabled
boolean

Whether the device is disabled by an administrator
lastUpdate
string or null <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
positionId
integer or null <int64>

Identifier of the last known position
groupId
integer or null <int64>

Parent group identifier when the device is assigned to a group
phone
string or null

Contact phone number used for SMS commands
model
string or null

Device model or hardware revision
contact
string or null

Responsible person's contact information
category
string or null

Free form category used for grouping devices in the UI
attributes
object

Custom attributes for protocol or business specific data

Update total distance and hours of the Device

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
path Parameters
id
required
integer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
deviceId
integer <int64>

Device identifier for the accumulator entry
totalDistance
number

in meters
hours
number

Total engine hours recorded by the device

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/devices/{id}/accumulators

Content type
application/json

  • "deviceId": 0,

}

Groups

Group management

Fetch a list of Groups

Without any params, returns a list of the Groups the user belongs to

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
all
boolean

Can only be used by admins or managers to fetch all entities
userId
integer

Standard users can use this only with their own userId
limit
integer

Limit the number of returned results
offset
integer

Offset for pagination
keyword
string

Search keyword filter

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/groups

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/groups

Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "groupId": 0,
    • "attributes": { }
    }
]

Create a Group

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique group identifier
name
string

Group display name
groupId
integer <int64>

Parent group identifier for nested grouping
attributes
object

Arbitrary metadata attached to the group

Responses

  • "attributes": { }
}

  • "groupId": 0,

Authorizations:

query Parameters
userId
string

limit
integer

Limit the number of returned results
offset
integer

Offset for pagination
keyword
string

Search keyword filter (searches name, email)

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "name": "string",
    • "email": "string",
    • "phone": "string",
    • "readonly": true,
    • "administrator": true,
    • "map": "string",
    • "latitude": 0,
    • "longitude": 0,
    • "zoom": 0,
    • "password": "string",
    • "coordinateFormat": "string",
    • "disabled": true,
    • "expirationTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "deviceLimit": 0,
    • "userLimit": 0,
    • "deviceReadonly": true,
    • "limitCommands": true,
    • "fixedEmail": true,
    • "poiLayer": "string",
    • "attributes": { }
    }
]

Create a User

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique user identifier
name
string

User display name
email
string

Email address used for login and notifications
phone
string or null

Contact phone number for alerts
readonly
boolean

When true, the user cannot change settings
administrator
boolean

Grants full administrative privileges when enabled
map
string or null

Preferred default map layer for the user
latitude
number

Default map center latitude for this user
longitude
number

Default map center longitude for this user
zoom
integer

Default map zoom level on login
password
string

Password for user authentication
coordinateFormat
string or null

Preferred coordinate display format
disabled
boolean

Indicates whether the user account is disabled
expirationTime
string or null <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
deviceLimit
integer

Maximum number of devices the user can manage
userLimit
integer

Maximum number of subordinate users
deviceReadonly
boolean

Restricts user from modifying device attributes
limitCommands
boolean

Prevents user from sending unsupported commands
fixedEmail
boolean

Locks the email field to avoid changes
poiLayer
string or null

External POI layer configured for the user
attributes
object

Additional custom user attributes

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/users

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/users

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/users

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/users

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/users

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/users

Permissions

User permissions and other object linking

Fetch permission links between Objects

Provide exactly two *Id query parameters matching the Permission body shape (e.g. reportId and deviceId). Use 0 on a side to mean "any", e.g. ?reportId=5&deviceId=0 lists all devices linked to report 5. At least one side must be non-zero.

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/permissions

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/permissions

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/permissions

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/permissions

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/permissions

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/permissions

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "userId": 0,
    • "deviceId": 0,
    • "groupId": 0,
    • "geofenceId": 0,
    • "notificationId": 0,
    • "calendarId": 0,
    • "attributeId": 0,
    • "driverId": 0,
    • "managedUserId": 0,
    • "commandId": 0
    }
]

Link an Object to another Object

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
userId
integer <int64>

User id, can be only first parameter
deviceId
integer <int64>

Device id, can be first parameter or second only in combination with userId
groupId
integer <int64>

Group id, can be first parameter or second only in combination with userId
geofenceId
integer <int64>

Geofence id, can be second parameter only
notificationId
integer <int64>

Notification id, can be second parameter only
calendarId
integer <int64>

Calendar id, can be second parameter only and only in combination with userId
attributeId
integer <int64>

Computed attribute id, can be second parameter only
driverId
integer <int64>

Driver id, can be second parameter only
managedUserId
integer <int64>

User id, can be second parameter only and only in combination with userId
commandId
integer <int64>

Saved command id, can be second parameter only

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/permissions

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/permissions

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/permissions

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/permissions

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/permissions

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/permissions

  • "attributeId": 0,

integer <int64>

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "userId": 0,
    • "deviceId": 0,
    • "groupId": 0,
    • "geofenceId": 0,
    • "notificationId": 0,
    • "calendarId": 0,

    • "driverId": 0,
    • "managedUserId": 0,
    • "commandId": 0
    }

Positions

Retrieving raw location information

Fetch a list of Positions

We strongly recommend using Traccar WebSocket API instead of periodically polling positions endpoint. Without any params, it returns a list of last known positions for all the user's Devices. from and to fields are not required with id.

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
deviceId
integer

deviceId is optional, but requires the from and to parameters when used
from
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
to
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
id
integer

To fetch one or more positions. Multiple params can be passed like id=31&id=42

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/positions

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/positions

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/positions

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/positions

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/positions

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/positions

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "deviceId": 0,
    • "protocol": "string",
    • "deviceTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "fixTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "serverTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
    • "valid": true,
    • "latitude": 0,
    • "longitude": 0,
    • "altitude": 0,
    • "speed": 0,
    • "course": 0,
    • "address": "string",
    • "accuracy": 0,
    • "network": { },
    • "geofenceIds": [
      • 0
      ],
    • "attributes": { }
    }
]

Deletes all the Positions of a device in the time span specified

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
deviceId
required
integer
from
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
to
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/positions

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/positions

https://server.traccar.org/api/positions

id
required
integer

Reports

Reports generation

Fetch a combined route, Events and Positions report for the Devices or Groups

At least one deviceId or one groupId must be passed

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
deviceId
Array of integers
groupId
Array of integers
from
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
to
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z

Array of integers

Array of integers
from
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
to

BasicAuthApiKey
path Parameters
type
required
string
Enum: "xlsx" "mail"
query Parameters
deviceId
Array of integers
groupId
Array of integers
from
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
to
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
deviceId
Array of integers
groupId
Array of integers
type
Array of strings

% can be used to return events of all types
from
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
to
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z

Download the events report as a spreadsheet or send it by email

Use type=xlsx to download the report, type=mail to deliver it by email asynchronously.

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
path Parameters
type
required
string
Enum: "xlsx" "mail"
query Parameters
deviceId
Array of integers
groupId
Array of integers
type
Array of strings

Event types to include; % matches all
alarm
Array of strings

Alarm types to include
from
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
to
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/reports/events/{type}

type

Array of integers
groupId
Array of integers
from
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
to
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
daily
boolean

Aggregate values by day instead of the full period

Notifications

User notifications management

Fetch a list of Notifications

Without params, it returns a list of Notifications the user has access to

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
all
boolean

Can only be used by admins or managers to fetch all entities
userId
integer

Standard users can use this only with their own userId
deviceId
integer

Standard users can use this only with _deviceId_s, they have access to
groupId
integer

Standard users can use this only with _groupId_s, they have access to
refresh
boolean
limit
integer

Limit the number of returned results
offset
integer

Offset for pagination
keyword
string

Search keyword filter

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/notifications

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/notifications

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/notifications

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/notifications

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/notifications

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/notifications

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
[
  • {
    • "id": 0,
    • "type": "string",
    • "description": "string",
    • "always": true,
    • "commandId": 0,
    • "notificators": "string",
    • "calendarId": 0,
    • "attributes": { }
    }
]

Create a Notification

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique identifier for the notification
type
string

Notification category such as geofenceEnter or ignitionOn
description
string or null

User-defined text describing the notification
always
boolean

Whether the notification triggers regardless of schedule
commandId
integer <int64>

Identifier of the command to send when the notification triggers
notificators
string

Comma-separated delivery channels (for example, web, mail)
calendarId
integer <int64>

Calendar identifier restricting when the notification is active
attributes
object

Additional custom attributes used by notificators or templates

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/notifications

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/notifications

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/notifications

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/notifications

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/notifications

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/notifications

application/json

  • "id": 0,

  • "description": "string",

  • "commandId": 0,
  • "notificators": "string",
  • "calendarId": 0,
  • "attributes": { }
}

path Parameters
id
required
integer
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique identifier for the notification
type
string

Notification category such as geofenceEnter or ignitionOn
description
string or null

User-defined text describing the notification
always
boolean

Whether the notification triggers regardless of schedule
commandId
integer <int64>

Identifier of the command to send when the notification triggers
notificators
string

Comma-separated delivery channels (for example, web, mail)
calendarId
integer <int64>

Calendar identifier restricting when the notification is active
attributes
object

Additional custom attributes used by notificators or templates

BasicAuthApiKey
path Parameters
notificator
required
string

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/notifications/test/{notificator}

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/notifications/test/{notificator}

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/notifications/test/{notificator}

Demo Server 4

Subscription Server

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/notifications/test/{notificator}

Send a custom notification to selected users using the specified notificator

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
path Parameters
notificator
required
string
query Parameters
userId
Array of integers <int64> [ items <int64 > ]

Optional list of user ids to send the notification to; if omitted, sends to all permitted users
Request Body schema: application/json
required
subject
string

Subject or title of the notification
digest
string

Short summary shown in compact contexts; defaults to the body when omitted
body
required
string

Full notification text
priority
boolean

Whether the message should be treated as high priority

Responses

Demo Server 1

https://demo.traccar.org/api/notifications/send/{notificator}

Demo Server 2

https://demo2.traccar.org/api/notifications/send/{notificator}

Demo Server 3

https://demo3.traccar.org/api/notifications/send/{notificator}

Demo Server 4

https://demo4.traccar.org/api/notifications/send/{notificator}

Subscription Server

https://server.traccar.org/api/notifications/send/{notificator}

Other Server

http://{host}:{port}/api/notifications/send/{notificator}

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "subject": "string",
  • "digest": "string",
  • "body": "string",
  • "priority": true
}

Geofences

Geofence management

Fetch a list of Geofences

Without params, it returns a list of Geofences the user has access to

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
all
boolean

Can only be used by admins or managers to fetch all entities
userId
integer

Standard users can use this only with their own userId
deviceId
integer

Standard users can use this only with _deviceId_s, they have access to
groupId
integer

Standard users can use this only with _groupId_s, they have access to
refresh
boolean
limit
integer

Limit the number of returned results
offset
integer

Offset for pagination
keyword
string

Search keyword filter

Responses

https://demo.traccar.org/api/geofences

Demo Server 2

Content type
application/json

    • "id": 0,

    • "attributes": { }
    }
]

Create a Geofence

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique identifier for the geofence
name
string

Human-readable name shown in lists and maps
description
string

Details about the geofence for display in the UI
area
string

Geofence area definition encoded as a WKT string
calendarId
integer <int64>

Calendar identifier limiting when the geofence is active
attributes
object

Custom key-value pairs for integrations or UI overrides

Responses

all

integer

application/json

    • "description": "string",
    • "type": "string",
    • "textChannel": true,
    • "attributes": { }
    }
]

Create a Saved Command

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique saved command identifier
deviceId
integer <int64>

Target device identifier when the command is bound to one device
description
string

User friendly label displayed in the UI
type
string

Command type as defined by the device protocol
textChannel
boolean

Whether to send the command using the SMS channel
attributes
object

Additional parameters required by the command type

Responses

integer

required
id
integer <int64>

Create a Driver

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique driver identifier

string

uniqueId
string

Unique external identifier for the driver

Maintenance

Maintenance management

Fetch a list of Maintenance tasks

Without params, it returns a list of Maintenance tasks the user has access to

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
query Parameters
all
boolean

Can only be used by admins or managers to fetch all entities
userId
integer

Standard users can use this only with their own userId
deviceId
integer

Standard users can use this only with _deviceId_s, they have access to
groupId
integer

Standard users can use this only with _groupId_s, they have access to
refresh
boolean
limit
integer

Limit the number of returned results
offset
integer

Offset for pagination
keyword
string

Search keyword filter

Create a Maintenance task

Authorizations:
BasicAuthApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
id
integer <int64>

Unique maintenance item identifier
name
string

Maintenance task name
type
string

Metric the maintenance is based on
start
number

Current accumulated value when maintenance tracking starts
period
number

Threshold value after which maintenance is due
attributes
object

Custom maintenance attributes

Responses

from
required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z

required
string <date-time>

in ISO 8601 format. eg. 1963-11-22T18:30:00Z
